decisions.activation_scope: original-model reactions only (filter on gfmodel); candidates recruited as means, never locked
decisions.growth_constraint: biomass >= minimum_obj enforced in both stages
decisions.api_location: gapfilling_mode='Comprehensive' in run_multi_gapfill, dispatching to MSGapfill.run_comprehensive_gapfilling
decisions.lock_semantics: default cap 0.001; raise lb of capped fra/rra to 0.001, direction-preserving; release after Stage 2
decisions.revbin: required for correctness (prevents net-zero futile dual activation)
